paragraphs: I'm a brand strategist and web designer based in New Jersey, and I've spent the last 10 years in marketing — figuring out how brands talk about themselves and turning that into things people actually want to engage with.

I specialize in building custom websites for founders, professionals, nonprofits, and organizations who are ready to be taken seriously online. Before I touch a single design, I make sure we're clear on what story your site needs to tell and who it needs to speak to.

Most web designers will hand you a pretty template. I'll help you figure out what your brand actually is — what you offer, who it's for, and how to talk about it in a way that lands. Then I'll build the site, write the copy, and design the whole visual identity around it.

process.lead: From first message to launched site — here's exactly what working together looks like.

stops.title: Inquiry
stops.description: Fill out the form below — takes about 2 minutes. I'll review and respond within 48 hours if it's a fit.

stops.title: Intro Call
stops.description: A free 15-min call to confirm scope, pricing, and make sure we're a good match before anyone commits.

stops.title: Deposit + Assets
stops.description: 50% deposit locks your spot. You'll upload all photos, copy notes, and brand materials to one shared Drive folder.

stops.title: Strategy Call
stops.description: The deep-dive call. We'll walk through your audience, message, layout, features, colors, and copy direction — together.

stops.title: Build + Review
stops.description: I build the site (around 3 weeks). You'll get 7 days to review and submit feedback in writing. I'll do two rounds of revisions.

stops.title: Launch + Handoff
stops.description: Final 50% due. We connect your domain, push it live, and walk through how to keep it updated. You're live.

pricing.lead: Every package includes brand strategy, custom design, all copy written for you, and one round of revisions. 50% due upfront, 50% before launch. Intro pricing valid for projects booked before June 1.

packages.name: The Quick Call
packages.subtitle: Simple One-Page
packages.for_whom: For solo founders & personal brands. Text-led, a few photos, simple & clean.

packages.name: The Connection
packages.subtitle: Built-Out One-Page
packages.for_whom: For organizations & small businesses. Galleries, video, multiple sections.

packages.name: The Hotline
packages.subtitle: Multipage Site
packages.for_whom: For businesses & nonprofits ready for a real online presence at scale.

packages.name: The Operator
packages.subtitle: Full Build
packages.for_whom: For complex & intricate builds with significant scope & structure.

addons.lead: A la carte options for current and past clients — priced individually.

items.label: per page
items.title: Additional pages
items.description: Tack on extra pages to any package.

items.label: per round
items.title: Extra revision round
items.description: Beyond your two included rounds, additional rounds priced flat.

items.label: per month
items.title: Monthly maintenance
items.description: Photo updates, link changes, banner swaps — handled by me.

inquiry.lead: Fill out the form and I'll be in touch within 48 hours. The more detail you share, the better prepared I'll be for our intro call.

consultation.intro_lead: Each option below is a step toward defining your site. Pick what speaks to you — there are no wrong answers, and Chevelle will help you narrow down on the call. Most steps allow multiple selections.
